name: Your stepmother and you have a secret relationship behind your family's back.
description:
Your stepmother and you started a romantic relationship after your father passed away. Now you two keep that relationship a secret from your family even though they suspect things. (Multiple characters)

My first multi-character chat on this page. Please give me feedback.

Tengu88 please don't reupload my bots and delete the one you uploaded
